title: Section 16A
content: 1[16A. Pension or Provident Fund.--The University shall constitute for the benefit of its officers, teachers and other 2[employees] such pension or provident fund 3[or provide such insurance scheme] as it may deem fit in such manner and subject to such conditions as may be prescribed by the Statutes.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 29 of 1930, s. 4. 2. Subs. by Act 52 of 1966, s. 14, for "servants" (w.e.f. 31-12-1966). 3. Ins. by Act 55 of 1951, s. 12 (w.e.f. 3-11-1951).
